3a:I[10752,["/_next/static/chunks/076f1ogf-il.v.js","/_next/static/chunks/11u.26kh8kw...js"],"ViewportBoundary"]
3c:I[10752,["/_next/static/chunks/076f1ogf-il.v.js","/_next/static/chunks/11u.26kh8kw...js"],"MetadataBoundary"]
7:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L35",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["path",{"d":"m21.73 18-8-14a2 2 0 0 0-3.48 0l-8 14A2 2 0 0 0 4 21h16a2 2 0 0 0 1.73-3","key":"wmoenq"}],["path",{"d":"M12 9v4","key":"juzpu7"}],["path",{"d":"M12 17h.01","key":"p32p05"}]],"className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"One-time install only"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"If you already have Mnemosyne running, skip to \"Verify\" or \"Troubleshooting\". Don't reinstall."}]}]]}]]}]}]
8:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Recommended Setup"}]
9:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"1. Install Mnemosyne"}]
a:["$","p",null,{"children":"Inside your Hermes virtual environment:"}]
b:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[all]\n"}]}]
c:["$","p",null,{"children":"If you're on a Debian/Ubuntu system with PEP 668 (externally-managed environment):"}]
d:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[all] --break-system-packages\n# or use a fresh venv:\npython3 -m venv mnemosyne-env\nsource mnemosyne-env/bin/activate\npip install mnemosyne-memory[all]\n"}]}]
e:["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Where should Mnemosyne live?"}]," Inside the same venv as Hermes, or a venv Hermes can access. The MemoryProvider import path must resolve. If you use Hermes's built-in venv (at ",["$","code",null,{"children":"/usr/local/lib/hermes-agent/venv/"}],"), install there."]}]
f:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"2. Configure Hermes to Use Mnemosyne"}]
10:["$","p",null,{"children":["Edit your ",["$","code",null,{"children":"~/.hermes/config.yaml"}],":"]}]
11:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-yaml","children":"memory:\n  # Keep the built-in MemoryStore for MEMORY.md system prompt\n  memory_enabled: true\n  user_profile_enabled: true\n  # Tell Hermes to use Mnemosyne as the provider\n  provider: mnemosyne\n  # Provider-specific configuration\n  mnemosyne:\n    # Profile isolation: false = all profiles share one DB (default)\n    #                  true  = each profile gets its own SQLite file\n    profile_isolation: false\n"}]}]
12:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"3. Understand the Controls (Critical)"}]
13:["$","p",null,{"children":["There are ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"two separate controls"}]," and they work independently:"]}]
14:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Config"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"What it controls"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"memory.memory_enabled"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Whether the built-in file-based MemoryStore exists and MEMORY.md appears in the system prompt. When ",["$","code",null,{"children":"false"}],", the built-in store is gone but ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne tools still work"}],"."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Memory toolset enable/disable"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Whether ANY memory tools (built-in AND Mnemosyne) are given to the AI model. Controlled by ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes tools enable memory"}]," / ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes tools disable memory"}],"."]}]]}]]}]]}]
15:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"The correct setup for using Mnemosyne:"}]}]
16:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Keep ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memory_enabled: true"}]," (or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"false"}]," — your choice, Mnemosyne works either way)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["Do NOT run ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes tools disable memory"}]]}]," unless you want to remove ALL memory tools from your model"]}],"\n"]}]
17:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-danger","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L35",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["line",{"x1":"12","x2":"12","y1":"8","y2":"12","key":"1pkeuh"}],["line",{"x1":"12","x2":"12.01","y1":"16","y2":"16","key":"4dfq90"}]],"className":"lucide-circle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Common mistake"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["If you run ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes tools disable memory"}],", you lose access to both the built-in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memory"}]," tool AND all Mnemosyne tools. This is the single most common integration failure."]}]}]]}]]}]}]
18:["$","p",null,{"children":["If you DO want to hide the built-in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memory"}]," tool but keep Mnemosyne tools... ",["$","strong",null,{"children":"you can't, currently."}]," Both are gated by the same toolset. This is being tracked as a UX issue."]}]
19:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h3","children":"4. Verify It's Working"}]
1a:["$","p",null,{"children":["Don't use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes memory status"}]," — it always prints \"Built-in: always active\" regardless of settings. It cannot tell you whether Mnemosyne is working."]}]
1b:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Instead, use these commands:"}]}]
1c:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Check that the provider loaded\nhermes doctor | grep -i memory\n\n# Check that Mnemosyne tools are registered\nhermes tools list\n\n# Direct test — this should succeed\nhermes --tool mnemosyne_remember content=\"Test memory from setup\" veracity=\"stated\"\nhermes --tool mnemosyne_recall query=\"Test memory\"\n"}]}]
1d:["$","p",null,{"children":"You should see something like:"}]
1e:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_remember — Store a memory in Mnemosyne\nmnemosyne_recall — Recall memories from Mnemosyne\nmnemosyne_forget — Forget/delete a memory\n...\n"}]}]
1f:["$","p",null,{"children":"If the tools don't show up, check:"}]
20:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne is installed (",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip list  | grep mnemosyne"}],")"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"provider: mnemosyne"}]," is set in config"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["You haven't run ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes tools disable memory"}]," (re-enable with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes tools enable memory"}],")"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Hermes was restarted after config changes"}],"\n"]}]
21:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Profile Isolation"}]
22:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne supports isolating memories per Hermes profile."}]
23:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"profile_isolation"}]}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Behavior"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"false"}]," (default)"]}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"All profiles share one database."}]," Memories from your English profile will appear when using your Italian profile, and vice versa."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"true"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Each profile gets its own SQLite file. Fully isolated. The bank name is derived from: profile name → Hermes home directory basename → \"default\" fallback."}]]}]]}]]}]
24:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"How bank names work:"}]}]
25:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Hermes sends the profile name as ",["$","code",null,{"children":"agent_identity"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Falls back to the basename of ",["$","code",null,{"children":"$$HERMES_HOME"}]," for that profile"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Falls back to \"default\""}],"\n"]}]
26:["$","p",null,{"children":"To enable per-profile isolation:"}]
27:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-yaml","children":"memory:\n  provider: mnemosyne\n  mnemosyne:\n    profile_isolation: true\n"}]}]
28:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L35",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"No profile parameter in tools"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne tools don't have a ",["$","code",null,{"children":"profile"}]," parameter. Isolation is handled transparently at the database level. You can't tell which bank you're writing to from the tool call."]}]}]]}]]}]}]
29:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Updating Mnemosyne"}]
2a:["$","pre",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"className":"language-bash","children":"# Inside your Hermes venv\npip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory[all]\n\n# Restart Hermes gateway\nhermes gateway restart\n"}]}]
2b:["$","p",null,{"children":"If the update triggers an infinite loop or gateway restart issues:"}]
2c:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Stop Hermes: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes stop"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Update Mnemosyne: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install --upgrade mnemosyne-memory[all]"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Clear any stale cache: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"rm -rf ~/.hermes/cache/*"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Start Hermes: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes start"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"If the dashboard shows thousands of memories to review, that's normal after a schema migration — the provider is re-indexing. Let it finish."}],"\n"]}]
2d:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Troubleshooting"}]
2e:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Symptom"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Likely cause"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Fix"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["Mnemosyne tools don't appear in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes tools list"}]]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Memory toolset is disabled"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes tools enable memory"}]," then restart"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes memory status"}]," shows \"Built-in: always active\""]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"This is a display bug — doesn't mean anything is wrong"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Ignore it; use ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes doctor"}]," instead"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"\"ModuleNotFoundError: No module named 'mnemosyne'\""}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Installed in wrong venv"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"pip install mnemosyne-memory[all]"}]," in Hermes's venv"]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Dashboard shows thousands of memories after update"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Schema migration re-indexing"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Let it finish; this is one-time per major version"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Loop of \"updating Mnemosyne\" suggestions"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Agent sees outdated docs and tries to fix"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Kill the session, start fresh. Update was already applied."}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Italian/English profiles share memories"}],["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"profile_isolation: false"}]," (the default)"]}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Set ",["$","code",null,{"children":"profile_isolation: true"}]," and restart each profile"]}]]}]]}]]}]

5:[[["$","script","0",{"type":"application/ld+json","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"{\"@context\":\"https://schema.org\",\"@type\":\"WebSite\",\"name\":\"Mnemosyne\",\"url\":\"https://docs.mnemosyne.site\",\"description\":\"Mnemosyne — The native memory system for AI agents. found."}],["$","div",null,{"style":"$0:f:0:1:0:props:children:1:props:children:props:children:props:children:1:props:notFound:0:1:props:style","children":["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","style",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"body{color:#000;background:#fff;margin:0}.next-error-h1{border-right:1px
